enrichment.summary: Kyle announces he is restarting YouTube vlogs, framing this as a new casual project after burning out on a Google-related initiative in Boulder. He reflects on how easy uploading feels this time, sets informal ground rules for his new vlog series, and briefly mentions cleaning his teeth with toenails and a passing thought about driving for Uber.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: wants to do it again with zero pressure — ultra-informal, just record and upload
harder and more time-consuming than expected; needs to pace himself instead of sprinting
thinks it would be cool because you get to talk to people

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have decided to start doing YouTube videos again.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I realized how easy it is to upload a video, at least in theory.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: There's really no reason to not upload videos.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The pressure I felt to upload videos was overwhelming and made it hard to focus.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I can focus on uploading videos now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Every few months, I work on a new project, burn out, and move on to something else.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I burned out on doing Boulder or Google-related things.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: YouTube is theoretically easy because you just record and upload.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I uploaded a 7-second video that took two hours to process.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I tried uploading a 20-minute video, but it's stuck at 0%.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: If uploading is this simple, I'll start making videos like crazy.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll do requests and make awesome content.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wonder why it took me so long to start doing this.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm making a 'Living in Boulder' video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I clean my teeth with toenails after spitting on them to sanitize.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been working on a Google Air thing in Boulder.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The Google Air thing in Boulder is more time-consuming than I originally thought.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I compared the effort to running in the mountains and getting out of breath.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to pace myself instead of sprinting through projects.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm taking a breather and slowing down.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm not familiar enough with Apple devices to answer a call while recording.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I find Apple products anti-intuitive and confusing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My rule for YouTube is to keep it super informal and just push the upload button.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I hope this video uploads quickly.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think being an Uber driver would be cool because you get to talk to people.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: People talk to Uber drivers when they're partying or in a good mood.
